title: GitHub Actions Reviewer
description: AI-powered PR reviews using ChatGPT or GitHub Copilot. Inline comments, summaries, or hybrid mode. Configurable presets from minimal to picky.

title: IX Chat
description: Windows desktop tray app for AI conversations. WinUI 3 interface with system tray integration, multi-provider support, and tool calling.

title: IX Tools
description: Tool packs that power tool calling in IX Chat and custom .NET integrations. Closed-source packs are private/licensed by default for IX Chat usage.

title: CLI Tools
description: One-command onboarding wizard, local web UI, multi-repo setup, auth management, and usage tracking.

title: .NET Library
description: Codex app-server client, Easy.ChatAsync one-liner, JSON-RPC support for building your own AI tools.

title: PowerShell Module
description: Binary cmdlets for scripting and automation. Connect, send messages, run diagnostics, and integrate with your workflows.

title: Issue Ops + Project Control
description: First-party GitHub Project control plane for PR and issue triage. Built-in issue-review flags stale or invalid infra blockers, proposes actions, and syncs confidence to project fields.
